message:
build: upgrade dependencies to latest versions

Bump dependency versions in Cargo.toml to pin explicit latest releases:
- libc: 0.2 -> 0.2.182
- serde: 1.0 -> 1.0.228
- toml: 1.0.1 -> 1.0.3
- tempfile: 3.20 -> 3.25

Cargo.lock updated accordingly, also pulling in transitive bumps:
- anyhow 1.0.101 -> 1.0.102
- bitflags 2.10.0 -> 2.11.0
- bumpalo 3.19.1 -> 3.20.2
- syn 2.0.115 -> 2.0.117
- toml_parser 1.0.8 -> 1.0.9
- unicode-ident 1.0.23 -> 1.0.24

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
